title: ZXSnake

hero.alt: ZX Series arcade game collection featuring ZX Snake, ZX Brick and ZX Space

description: ZXSnake is part of the [ZX Series](/zx-series), a retro-inspired arcade snake game featuring classic gameplay, unlockable themes, achievements, and modern controls with a nostalgic ZX Spectrum inspired visual style.
features: BarkinMad Coins for cross-game cosmetic unlocks

barkinMadCoins.description: Earn [BarkinMad Coins](/zx-series) through gameplay and use them to unlock cosmetic items across supported BarkinMad Studios games. Coins have no cash value and are earned through gameplay only.

faq.question: Is ZXSnake part of the ZX Series?
faq.answer: Yes. ZXSnake is part of the [ZX Series](/zx-series), a connected collection of retro-inspired arcade games from BarkinMad Studios.

faq.question: Does ZXSnake support achievements and leaderboards?
faq.answer: Yes. ZXSnake includes Game Center achievements and leaderboards for score chasing and progression.

faq.question: Can ZXSnake use BarkinMad Coins?
faq.answer: Yes. ZXSnake supports [BarkinMad Coins](/zx-series) as a gameplay reward system for cosmetic unlocks across supported BarkinMad Studios games.
